entry.title: Meta's Muse Image Beats Google but Trails OpenAI in AI Image Generation
entry.summary: Meta Superintelligence Labs ships its first image model with agentic tool use, emergent self-refinement, and deep social context from Instagram

entry.title: Tencent Drops Hy3, a 295B Open-Weight Coding Agent Slashing Hallucinations in Half
entry.summary: Tencent's Hy3 is a fully open-source 295B MoE coding model with 256K context, now free on OpenCode and OpenRouter

entry.title: Anthropic Gives 10,000 Open Source Maintainers $1,200 of Free Claude Max
entry.summary: Anthropic is expanding its Claude for Open Source program, giving qualifying maintainers 6 months of its $200/month Claude Max 20x plan for free.

entry.title: Anthropic's Claude Cowork Breaks Free of the Open-Laptop Trap
entry.summary: Claude Cowork breaks free from the desktop â tasks now run in the cloud, and you can manage everything from your phone or browser

entry.title: Google DeepMind's Aeneas Lets Historians Decode Ancient Rome Without Writing Code
entry.summary: Google DeepMind's Predicting the Past Skill wraps Aeneas and Ithaca into a plain-English interface inside Google Antigravity, letting historians analyze ancient inscriptions without writing code.

entry.title: Nous Research's Hermes Agent Now Pulls Secrets From Multiple Vaults Safely
entry.summary: Hermes Agent adds 1Password support and a plugin API so any secret vault can feed credentials into the agent at startup

entry.title: Cohere's Cohere Transcribe Arabic Beats Meta's 7B Model at 2B Parameters
entry.summary: Cohere releases a 2B-parameter open-source Arabic ASR model that beats Whisper Large v3 by 11 WER points and runs at 3.5x the throughput

entry.title: LiquidAI's Antidoom Slashes AI Reasoning Doom Loops by 95% in Hours
entry.summary: Liquid AI's open-source Antidoom surgically removes doom loops from reasoning models, cutting loop rates by up to 95% without RL or quality loss.

entry.title: Google Cloud's ScientistOne Writes AI Research Papers With Zero Hallucinated References
entry.summary: Google's ScientistOne automates the full research pipeline â literature review, experimentation, and paper writing â while being the only system to achieve zero hallucinated references across a 75-paper audit.

entry.title: Artificial Analysis Releases 6 Industry Indices That Reshape How Developers Pick AI Models
entry.summary: Artificial Analysis launches six domain-specific AI benchmarks grounded in real job tasks, revealing sharp tradeoffs between frontier performance and cost.

entry.title: Google's Gemini Spark Now Watches the Web and Acts Without Being Asked
entry.summary: Gemini Spark gains real-time event tracking, macOS support, MCP integration, and new third-party app connections in a major update to Google's 24/7 AI agent

entry.title: OpenAI's gpt-realtime-2.1-mini Brings Reasoning and Tool Use at 6x Lower Cost
entry.summary: GPT-Realtime-2.1-mini brings reasoning and tool use to the budget voice tier, plus a 25%+ p95 latency cut across all Realtime voice models
